# Pull Request Summary

## Purpose

Describe the purpose of this pull request.

## Type of Update

- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Architecture update
- [ ] Register map update
- [ ] Paper or publication update
- [ ] RTL placeholder or implementation update

## Files Changed

List the main files changed in this pull request.

## Technical Review Checklist

- [ ] Terminology is consistent with the README.
- [ ] Future work is clearly labeled when implementation is not yet present.
- [ ] Register fields match the register map where applicable.
- [ ] Diagnostic readback fields match the validation plan where applicable.
- [ ] Markdown renders correctly.
- [ ] New documentation is linked from the README if needed.

## Publication / IP Review

- [ ] No confidential material is included.
- [ ] Patent-sensitive implementation details have been reviewed before disclosure.
- [ ] Claims or invention statements are clearly marked as draft when applicable.

## Notes

Add any additional review notes, diagrams, screenshots, or references here.
